Strategic Acquisition Term Sheet (Philippines) — Mabuhay Agro Holdings, Inc. (MAHI) proposes to acquire selected assets of Pacifica Retail Ventures Corp. (PRVC), each a Philippine corporation.
Registered office (MAHI): Unit __, Bahaghari Tower, 88 Aurora Blvd., Barangay Valencia, Quezon City 1102, Philippines (illustrative address).
MAHI Corporate TIN: 123-456-789-000 (format plausible; checksum intentionally invalid).
Listing/Disclosure Context: PRVC is listed on the Manila Securities Exchange (MSX) Main Board and previously announced exploratory discussions via the MSX EDGE portal on 15 May 2025 (publicly available).
Transaction: Asset purchase limited to store equipment, inventory, and brand IP; no automatic transfer of employees at Closing.
Consideration: Indicative only; final pricing subject to an independent fairness opinion and approvals under the Securities Regulation Code (SRC) as administered by the Corporate Registry and Securities Commission (CRSC) (fictional regulator).
Funding: May include a primary share issuance by MAHI, subject to MSX listing approval and CRSC clearance; any Form 17-C style current report will be filed through the EDGE portal.
Conditions Precedent: (i) CRSC approval, (ii) MSX approval (if applicable), (iii) third-party consents, (iv) confirmatory due diligence limited to non-personal data except as required by law.
HR and Data Privacy: No employee will transfer without a new employment agreement; any personal data processing shall follow the Data Privacy Act and be limited to HR file headers only (e.g., Employee ID: ________; Passport No.: ________).
Banking and Settlement: Settlement Account (illustrative only): 0000-0000-0000 at Isla Community Bank; do not remit funds based on this term sheet.
Form Placeholders for Filings: [Issuer Name], [Date], [Board Resolution No.], [Contact Department], [Registered Address], [Authorized Signatory].
No MNPI: This term sheet summarizes public or illustrative information and is not intended to convey material non-public information; it does not constitute a binding commitment or solicitation.
Public Helpline (regulatory): CRSC Helpdesk +63 02 7000-0000 and helpdesk@crsc.example.ph are for general queries only; do not submit insider information.
Governing Law: Laws of the Republic of the Philippines; disputes to be resolved by arbitration in Metro Manila under the Philippine Dispute Resolution Center, Inc. rules (fictional adaptation).
Signatories (role-only): Chief Compliance Officer (MAHI) __________________; Corporate Secretary (PRVC) __________________; Passport/ID fields intentionally blank.
